item.title: The 'Dark Factory' Myth
item.description: The idea of the 'dark factory' has gained new attention as advances in robotics and AI accelerate, with stories ranging from fully automated automotive plants to experiments with humanoid robots.

item.title: Digital Radiography Boosts Weld Inspection Precision at Bellows Systems
item.description: The DRC 2430 digital detector from DÜRR NDT and the D-Tect X software ensure improved accuracy by providing superior image resolution.

item.title: Visions: A Machine Vision and Automation Solution Podcast
item.description: VSD Editor in Chief Sharon Spielman interviews experts from Shaw Industries and Accella AI about an AI vision system that replaced manual pallet checks to speed up loading dock verification, improve accuracy, and integrate with existing PLC, WMS, and ERP systems.

item.title: FARO Creaform CUBE-R M Series 3D Scanner
item.description: FARO Creaform has launched the CUBE-R M Series, a modular and automated 3D measurement cell designed to integrate advanced MetraSCAN 3D-R scanning for fast, high-accuracy at-line quality control in mass production environments.

item.title: Royma Harnesses Excillum X-Ray Sources for Real-World Inline CT
item.description: Royma has partnered with Excillum to integrate high-brightness MetalJet X-ray sources into their inline CT platform, improving inspection speeds and resolution for battery manufacturing.

item.title: Line-Scan Camera Delivers Unmatched Speed and Precision for Automated Sorting Systems
item.description: Allied Vision's allPIXA neo 6k 10GigE line-scan camera provides engineers with the tools to build faster, smarter, and more accurate automated sorting solutions.

item.title: Precision XY Gantry System Offers Configurable Motion for High-Throughput - High-Accuracy Applications
item.description: The X-365 Precision XY Gantry System is a modular, robust Cartesian gantry solution engineered for demanding industrial automation and high-throughput applications.
